name: Sushi Shrimp Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Cooked medium-grain white rice, at room temperature
1 lb Cooked, peeled, and deveined Large shrimp
1 1/2 quarts Rinsed, crisped fresh spinach leaves
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine cooked rice, cucumber, peas, sliced radishes, onions, and dressing.
2. Gently mix in shrimp.
3. Arrange spinach leaves on a platter and spoon sushi salad into the center.
4. Garnish with whole radishes.
5. Season to taste with salt.
